name: Bálint Kriván
message:
Hi!
Thanks for your post, I’m having a Dell 3350 also, and it helped me a lot!
Do you have the Radeon version of Vostro? Because I do, and aticonfig didn’t want to work, do you have any suggestion where should I keep digging?
Thanks!

name: José Domingo Muñoz
message:
Hello, sorry but I have not had experience with this video card.
Regards.

name: Laptop Vostro 3350
message: Pretty nice post. I just stumbled upon your weblog and wanted to mention that I have really loved browsing your blog posts. In any case I’ll be subscribing on your feed and I hope you write once more soon!

name: inavsan
message: Despues de reinstalar Debian 8 o 9 veces, eres el único que me lo ha solucionado. Tengo un Dell XPS 702x y la solución estaba en ponerle el último kernel. Un millón de gracias a ti y a los que compartís tan generosamente vuestro saber.
